overall.description: A maritime ship simulator showing a first-person view from the vessel's bridge at night. The camera faces forward through bridge windows toward the ship's bow, with illuminated navigation displays overhead showing radar, nautical charts, and depth data as the vessel moves steadily through open water near a coastline.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with navigation consoles overlooking the bow

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel from the bridge, monitoring the navigation displays while maintaining course through open water

entered.detail: left navigation display showing nautical chart with green landmass and blue water
center navigation display showing circular radar with rotating yellow sweep
right navigation display showing blue depth finder readout
triangular bow structure of the vessel with red deck markings and white railings
metal safety railing along the left side of the bow deck
metal safety railing along the right side of the bow deck
dark open water visible beyond the ship's bow

segments.scene_description: The view from a ship's bridge at night, looking forward over the vessel's bow. Three illuminated navigation displays are mounted overhead showing charts, radar, and depth data. The ship moves steadily through dark open water, with the bow structure and safety railings visible in the foreground. The scene remains consistent throughout with no significant changes in the maritime environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, focused perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a dark maritime environment. It begins with a forward-facing view over the vessel's bow, where the ship's structure and safety railings are clearly visible in the foreground. As the vessel moves steadily through the open water, the camera captures the glow of three illuminated navigation displays mounted overhead, which provide constant updates on charts, radar, and depth data. The scene remains consistent in its nocturnal atmosphere, with the dark sea stretching forward under the bridge's artificial light.
